name: Potential AD User Enumeration From Non-Machine Account
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Maxime Thiebaut (@0xThiebaut)
SIGMA Title: Potential AD User Enumeration From Non-Machine Account
SIGMA Description: Detects read access to a domain user from a non-machine account

False positives:
- Administrators configuring new users.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4662 AND LOWER("Object Type") LIKE '%bf967aba-0de6-11d0-a285-00aa003049e2%' AND (LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%1_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%3_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%4_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%7_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%9_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%b_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%d_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%f_')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msol_%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential AD User Enumeration From Non-Machine Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4662 AND LOWER("Object Type") LIKE '%bf967aba-0de6-11d0-a285-00aa003049e2%' AND (LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%1_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%3_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%4_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%7_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%9_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%b_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%d_' OR LOWER("Access Mask") LIKE '%f_')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msol_%'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential AD User Enumeration From Non-Machine Account

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
